ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #38, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for (petitoners) Bank of the West.

Mr. Dougherty reported that the net income after costs is about $1,200.00, distribution was about $35,000.00 and that unless there is an increase in inflation it does not make sense to continue on with the trust. The accounting petition was taken under submission and a status on filing the 39th and final accounting is set for June 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #36, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Bank of the West.

The Court questioned the need for the Trust and asked why the Trustee does not select some charities, distribute the assets and terminate the Trust. Mr. Dougherty stated that they have selected some recipients and that it will be in the 37th Account, and explained the extent of services provided to support the fee request. The 36th Account is approved but taken under submission as to the Attorney's fees.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
